app.rdg: 1. Kraa o kwi Sherk-Siam?
1. x팳a툾 툾u k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab.
1. many Q the sky nobleman
1. Are there many gods?
Whe la kraa kwi Sherk-Siam, rol diecho kwi Sherk-Siam.
x퉝i툾 l톛x팳a툾 k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab, x팳퉝ul퉢 d톛c팳'u툾 k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab.
not many the sky nobleman, only one the sky nobleman
There are not many gods, there is only one God.
2. Kraa o kwi parson al kwi Sherk-Siam?
2. x팳a툾 툾u k퉝i parson 툾al k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab?
2. many Q the person in the sky nobleman
2. Are there many persons in God?
Tlewhehu parson al kwi Sherk-Siam: Bads, Bedas, Sent-Ospli.
톫ix퉝톛x퉝 parson 툾al k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab: bads, b톛da툾s, Sent-Ospli.
three person in the sky nobleman: Father, Son, Holy Spirit
There are three persons in God: the Father, the Son, the Holy Spirit.
3. Bads o rol o Bads, Bedas o rol o Bedas, Sent-Ospli o rol o Sent-Ospli?
3. bads 툾u x팳퉝ul퉢 툾u bads, b톛da툾s 툾u x팳퉝ul퉢 툾u b톛da툾s, Sent-Ospli 툾u x팳퉝ul퉢 Sent-Ospli.
3. father Q only Q father, son Q only Q son, holy-spirit Q only holy-spirit
3. Is the Father only the Father, is the Son only the Son, is the Holy Spirit only the Holy Spirit?
E, Bads hoi rol Bads, Bedas hoi rol Bedas, Sent-Ospli hoi rol Sent-Ospli.
툾i, bads huy x팳퉝ul퉢 bads, b톛da툾s huy x팳퉝ul퉢 b톛da툾s, Sent-Ospli huy x팳퉝ul퉢 Sent-Ospli.
yes father well only father, son well only son, holy-spirit well only holy-spirit
Yes, the Father is only the Father, the Son is only the Son, the Holy Spirit is only the Holy Spirit.
4. Bads, Bedas, Sent-Ospli, tlewhehu o ta tsahadilh parson, tor o rol diecho Sherk-Siam?
4. bads, b톛das, Sent-Ospli, 톫ix퉝톛x퉝 툾u t톛 c톛di톫 parson, tux팳퉝 툾u x팳퉝ul퉢 d톛c팳'u툾 s팳톛q si툾ab.
4. father, son, holy spirit, three Q the them person, simply Q one sky nobleman
4. Are the Father, Son, and Holy Spirit three persons, are they just only one God?
E, Bad, Bedas, Sent-Ospli, tlewhehu ta tsahadilh parson dididiecho, tor rol diecho Sherk-Siam.
툾i, bad, b톛da툾s, Sent-Ospli, 톫ix퉝톛x퉝 t톛 c톛di톫 parson didid톛c'u툾, tux팳퉝 x팳퉝ul퉢 d톛c팳'u툾 s팳톛q si툾ab.
yes, Father, Son, holy spirit, three the them person one-by-one, simply only one sky nobleman
Yes, the Father, Son, and Holy Spirit are three separate persons, and are just only one God.
5. Telh o Bads, Bedas, Sent-Ospli, rol lekralgwas dhual kwi boku stab?
5. t톛톫 툾u bads, b톛da툾s, Sent-Ospli, x팳퉝ul퉢 l톛x팳alg퉝as dx퉝툾al k퉝i b톛k퉢퉝 stab툾
5. true Q father, son, holy spirit, only equal above the all things
5. Is it true that the Father, Son, and Holy Spirit alone are equal above all things?
E, telh Bads, Bedas, Sent-Ospli, rol lekralgwas dhual kwi boku stab.
툾i, t톛톫 bads, b톛da툾s, Sent-Ospli, x팳퉝ul퉢 l톛x팳alg퉝as dx퉝툾al k퉝i b톛k퉢퉝 stab.
yes, true father, son, holy spirit, only equal above the all things
Yes, it is true that the Father, Son, and Holy Spirit alone are equal above all things?
